name: How much is my ranking drop case worth for a Houston law firm?

mainEntity.name: How much is my ranking drop case worth for a Houston law firm?

acceptedAnswer.description: Value depends on provable losses (e.g., $50K-$500K+ for mid-size firm), minus defenses; often settles low.[1] Key factors: revenue drop %, duration, jurisdiction.[3] Forensic accounting audit, multiplier on losses, realistic $0-100K start.[1] Varies wildly.
